checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: Stable-strategy pass 2: 16 tests passed, MDE parse checked 34 files, sample index check passed, and fixture evaluation passed.

checks.name: public root UI with query parameters
checks.evidence: Root URL with q=airfoil drag coefficient returned HTML containing Search Cranfield, Indexed Data, and the query text.

checks.name: public metadata canonical endpoint
checks.evidence: /api/cranfield/meta returned 1,400 documents and abstract field weight 2x.

checks.name: public canonical Cranfield search
checks.evidence: /api/cranfield/search returned live cranfield-v0 results for 'airfoil drag coefficient'; top result id 1201; total hits 363; API latency 283 ms; OpenSearch took 4 ms.

checks.name: public canonical Cranfield explain
checks.evidence: /api/cranfield/explain returned the generated OpenSearch query and top result id 1201 for 'airfoil drag coefficient'; API latency 71 ms; OpenSearch took 5 ms.

blocked_or_skipped.name: browser visual screenshot
blocked_or_skipped.reason: The browser plugin reported no available browser instances.

evidence_quality: Stable-strategy pass 2 confirmed local validation and public UI, metadata, search, and explain behavior with no code, strategy, or validator changes between stable passes.
